calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-21-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeff Strobel for Administrator. Giulio Accornero for American Research Bureau.

Counsel addressed the issue of notice to Mr. Accornero's Clients. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

Off Calendar Aug-16-2010 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Receipt For Blocked Account
Off Calendar Jul-19-2010 Continued To Aug-16-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-23-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeff Strobel for Jeffrey John.

Ms. Strobel stated that he filed a corrected proof of service, an amended declaration and that Ms. Accornero had notice of today's hearing. The Court granted the petition (subject to a written order). Bond is fixed in the amount of $25,000.00. The Franklin Templeton account is to remain in a blocked account. Status of filing of receipt for blocked account was set for July 19, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
